name: Cetus Yield Agent
description: Autonomous concentrated-liquidity agent on Cetus Protocol (Sui). Phase 1 monitors pool prices read-only; Phase 2+ opens positions, earns trading fees, and auto-repositions when the price drifts out of range.
author: holonym-foundation

envVars.description: `monitor` (read-only, no funds at risk - Phase 1) or `active` (opens + rebalances real positions - Phase 2+)
Half-width of the position's tick range around the current tick
Drift in ticks from position centre before triggering a rebalance
Milliseconds between pool checks (default 5 minutes per recipe)
Sui RPC endpoint (defaults to @mysten/sui's fullnode for the chosen NETWORK)
Optional hard cap on USD deployed when opening a position; not in the canonical recipe but adds an extra ceiling
If `true`, simulate every tx via Sui gRPC instead of submitting via waap-cli. Logs effects + gas so operators can verify a planned action before going live.
Path to the rebalance intent file used for crash-recovery reconciliation (default: `<projectName>.intent.json` in cwd)
Optional path for a JSON-line log file (default: `<projectName>.log` in cwd)
